purpose: Production landscape gameplay and title diorama background with no baked live enemies
source_method: OpenAI built-in image editing; targeted removal of fixed enemy figures from the project-owned v02 landscape master
prompt_summary: Preserve the TRI RELAY landscape city, facilities, relay, camera and lighting; remove all fixed enemy figures from the red bridge and reconstruct it with empty industrial structure, warning lights, smoke and non-figurative red fog.
post_processing: The edited enemy/bridge region was resized to the 1920x1080 source geometry and feather-composited over the unchanged v02 master; exported as sRGB WebP quality 84.
rights_status: Generated specifically for TRI RELAY from project-owned source art; organization legal/brand review required before paid commercial distribution.
